# Burchie's Fried Chicken

> Auckland food truck serving crispy, double-fried, free-range boneless-thigh
> chicken in six styles (O.G., American, Mexican, Thai, Korean, plus Korean
> fried cauliflower for vegetarians). 24-hour marinade. Five sauces. One truck.

Owner: Thomas Burchell. Operating in Auckland, Aotearoa New Zealand since May 2025.

## Menu

- **O.G.** — unadulterated, 24-hour marinade, double-fried. Chicken as it was intended.
- **American** — crispy fried chicken, buffalo sauce, ranch, chives.
- **Mexican** — Mexican spices, chipotle mayo, pickled jalapeños.
- **Thai** — sweet Thai chilli-lime sauce, fresh coriander, crushed peanuts.
- **Korean** — gochujang sauce, Kewpie mayo, sesame seeds, scallions.
- **Korean Cauliflower** — vegetarian, Korean treatment on crispy fried cauliflower.

Sides: rainbow slaw, crinkle-cut fries with chicken salt, brown-butter Whittaker's chocolate-chip cookies.

## Where to find us

Regular stops across Auckland:
- Waterview Coffee Project — 11-15 Blockhouse Bay Rd, Waterview
- Pūhoi Pub Hotel — 4 Saleyards Rd, Pūhoi
- Oratia Bowling Club — 637 West Coast Rd, Oratia
- Crafty Bakery Titirangi — 400 Titirangi Rd, Titirangi
- Kumeu Market — 17 Access Rd, Kumeu Showgrounds

Schedule varies week to week — Instagram has the current roster.

## Catering

We book weddings, corporate lunches, birthdays, and private parties across Auckland.
Minimum 20 guests. Response within a day. Enquiries via the catering page or phone.

## Contact

- Phone: +64 22 648 9257
- Email: burchies.friedchicken@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/burchies.fried.chicken/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61576948422449
- Twitch (behind-the-scenes): https://twitch.tv/burchietv

- [Home](https://burchies-website.vercel.app/): menu, story, this week's stops
- [Catering](https://burchies-website.vercel.app/catering): book the truck for events
